results.rendered_html: mārkaṇḍeya—purāṇa n. N. of one of the 18 Purāṇas (so called from its supposed author M˚; it expounds the nature of Kṛṣṇa and explains some of the incidents of the Mahā-bhārata; it differs from the other Purāṇas in the form of its narrative rather than its sectarial character),  IW. 387 n. 1 ; 514.
